question:
A survey asked students what types of exercise they regularly do. Based on the results, the following statements are all true.

• 50 students run.
• 40 students swim.
• 15 students both run and swim.
• 20 students neither run nor swim.

How many students were surveyed?

solution.strategy: Use Venn: total = only run + only swim + both + neither.
